checks.name: Create, save, load, and update task state
checks.evidence: tests/test_task_state.py covers round-trip persistence and update behavior.

checks.name: State file location
checks.evidence: state_file_path() and save_state() write to workspace/tasks/{task_id}/state.json.

checks.name: Quality gate fields
checks.evidence: TaskState includes goal_approved, design_review_passed, tests_passed, code_review_passed, and human_merge_approved gates.

checks.name: Error paths
checks.evidence: Tests cover invalid task ids, escaping artifact paths, and unknown quality gates.

non_blocking_notes: dev-003 should wire TaskState into the local orchestrator and stop only at configured quality gates.
